package rulecoverage

func PositiveSameServiceMethodAcceptsTxAndBeginsTx() string {
    ruleID := "same_service_method_accepts_tx_and_begins_tx"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Service methods that sometimes reuse a transaction and sometimes open one themselves."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
